  "active_set": ["R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.2", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": false,
  "clarification_question": "",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.6": "The request to 'Polish this' targets sentence- and paragraph-level grammar, flow, and conciseness without altering content.",
    "RX.1": "Polishing should preserve stated uncertainties and qualifiers (e.g., sub-regional variability and sensitivity).",
    "RX.2": "Edits must not strengthen or add claims (e.g., causality or model appropriateness) beyond what the text already asserts.",
    "RX.3": "Scope is limited to wording improvements, avoiding structural reorganization or methodological reinterpretation.",
    "RX.4": "Language changes should not introduce misleading interpretations of climate–agriculture relationships that could misinform decisions.",
    "RX.5": "Maintain fidelity to the original meaning and terminology so that provenance of claims and diagnostics remains clear."
  }
}

rationale.R1.6: The request to 'Polish this' targets sentence- and paragraph-level grammar, flow, and conciseness without altering content.
rationale.RX.1: Polishing should preserve stated uncertainties and qualifiers (e.g., sub-regional variability and sensitivity).
rationale.RX.2: Edits must not strengthen or add claims (e.g., causality or model appropriateness) beyond what the text already asserts.
rationale.RX.3: Scope is limited to wording improvements, avoiding structural reorganization or methodological reinterpretation.
rationale.RX.4: Language changes should not introduce misleading interpretations of climate–agriculture relationships that could misinform decisions.
rationale.RX.5: Maintain fidelity to the original meaning and terminology so that provenance of claims and diagnostics remains clear.
